content.en:
Evading the detection of the innate gods again and again, Ye Tian has no worries now.

Moreover, he has used the Desolate Pattern Talent many times, and he has become more and more comfortable with the use of the Desolate Talent, and he can even temporarily block the lock of the power of the Innate Gods and Goddesses.

Therefore, unless the innate gods spend a huge amount of money to find him, it is really not easy to find him in ordinary ways.

After all, Ye Tian himself had too many talents, and it was too difficult to disguise his talents and various soul secret techniques to change his soul aura, and it was too difficult to lock his position.

this day.

Ye Tian was going to go to the center of the Wasteland, he wasn't going there to capture Zichenmu.

It was the territory of the desolate demons, and if you went there to seize Zichenmu, it would be tantamount to looking for death.

The reason why Ye Tian went there was because of a chance.

Not long ago, he infiltrated a Shang clan in the Wasteland, and learned a secret of the Wasteland from the mouth of the cosmic god of the Shang Clan, and he was very interested in this secret.

Of course, the more important reason is that it is difficult for him to obtain Zichenmu anymore.

Perhaps it was because he had captured Zichenmu too much, and the innate gods couldn't catch him, so they each set up terrifying formations among the tribes they had created, which could protect the place where Zichenmu was located, so that he could not enter.

Therefore, even if he broke into a certain wasteland race now, he would not be able to snatch Zichenmu.

If he wants to get Zichenmu now, he can only go to the wild to find the ownerless Zichenmu, but it is too difficult to find it this way.

Thinking about it carefully, he now got so much Zichenmu, and there was no shortage of Zichenmu at all, so there was no need to take Zichenmu anymore.

In comparison, he still wants to get other opportunities.

And now, he knows about this opportunity.

"According to the cosmic god, there is a desolate tower in the center of the wasteland. The Wasteland Tower is very mysterious, having existed before the birth of the innate gods of the Wasteland. And the reason why so many supremes were born in the desolate realm has a lot to do with the desolate tower!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before, he was very puzzled as to why such a small place in the Wasteland could give birth to so many supreme beings and masters.

There are also more innate gods in the outside world, and the number of them add up far beyond the desolate realm I don't know how many times, but in the outside world, it is very difficult for an innate god to become a supreme, even if the talent can be reached, but most of them can only reach the level of Tianzun, if you want to become a supreme, you must maintain the combat power of your highness at the supreme level when you are at the peak of the great god level.

And this standard is too high, an era can often only give birth to a little supreme, and an era of a cosmic family may not be able to give birth to a supreme.

For example, the human race, in this era that Ye Tian is in, except for him, the others are relatively ordinary, and there is no way to give birth to a supreme-level highness, and the god race has only given birth to one or two supreme-level highnesses, and the demon race is estimated to be about the same.

But the desolate realm is too abnormal, almost every innate god can grow to the realm of domination, and once it becomes the realm of Tianzun, it will become the supreme, which is very terrifying!

There are a lot of resources in the wasteland, yes, but becoming a supreme is not a matter of resources, if you have more resources, you can become a supreme, but the gods and demons are the supreme everywhere.

Heritage, talent, resources, chance, and luck are all indispensable.

But it is clear that the wasteland undoubtedly does not have these conditions.

Moreover, it is said that those innate gods of the Wasteland Realm hardly leave the Wasteland Realm, and they have been living in such a small place, how can they break through to become supreme.

Now Ye Tian has a guess, that is, the Deserted Tower!

"The Desolate Tower is an extremely important place in the Desolate Realm, but unfortunately, even the Shang Clan is not qualified to enter the Desolate Tower, and there is no way to even contact it. Except for the innate gods, only the desolate demons can enter the desolate tower. "

This is the information that Ye Tian got.

As for why only the desolate demons were allowed to enter the desolate tower, and not other upper clans were allowed to enter the desolate tower, the cosmic god was not clear, and he was also jealous of the desolate demon clan.

But this is a rule set by the innate gods, if any other Shang clan approaches the barren tower without permission, there is only one dead word in the end.

There was once an extremely powerful cosmic god who broke into the barren tower area and was killed on the spot by an innate god.

Ye Tian guessed that conditions were needed to enter the Desolate Tower, otherwise the innate gods of the Desolate Realm would not be so selfish and only let the Desolate Demons enter.

After all, every race in the wasteland was created by innate gods, how could those innate gods not care about their own race.

"Unless those upper or lower clans can't enter the desolate tower at all, or it's useless to enter, and the desolate demon can enter the desolate tower, it is the desolate demon who meets the conditions for entering. "

Ye Tian thought.

There is only one difference between the Desolate Demon and the other upper clans, and that is the Desolate Pattern talent.

The desolate demon can mobilize the power of the desolate world, if this is the reason, then Ye Tian can also enter the desolate tower, because he also has the talent of the desolate pattern, and he can also mobilize the power of the desolate world.

"The Desolate Tower is so important, if I trespass without permission, the innate gods may not dare to attack me due to the agreement with the supreme beings of the outside world, but those terrifying cosmic gods of the Desolate Demon Clan will definitely attack me. "

Ye Tian thought.

Therefore, he thought of a way, which was to disguise himself as a desolate demon clan and enter the desolate tower.

Of course.

Ye Tian casually disguised himself as a desolate demon, and he would definitely be discovered.

The number of desolate demons is small, and it is easy to identify, and the sudden appearance of a strange desolate demon will definitely be listed as the object of attention.

No matter how strong Ye Tian's ability to disguise is, he will be discovered.

Therefore, he must ban a certain galaxy-level desolate demon, and by the way, learn more about the situation from the mouth of that galaxy-level desolate demon, so as not to make some mistakes and so on.

......

In the middle of the wasteland, on the territory of the desolate demons.

Ye Tian came here in disguise, and turned on the Desolate Pattern Talent all the time, so as not to be discovered by the innate gods.

It seems that the innate gods are no longer paying attention to him, so he is safe now.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian had been carefully looking for the traces of the desolate demon.

And his target is only a galaxy-level desolate demon, once he senses the aura of other powerful desolate demons, he immediately stays away.

In such a situation, it is not easy to find the right target.

Wait!

Ye Tian must wait slowly, and he must not be impatient.

At this time, some of the other powerhouses of the outside world in the wasteland snatched the Zichenmu and left the wasteland smoothly, not daring to stay in the wasteland, while others were killed by the powerhouses of the wasteland and stayed in the wasteland forever.

In terms of proportion, most of the powerhouses of the various races in the outside world died in the Wasteland, and the same is true for most of the galaxy-level and galaxy-level of the human race.

There is no way, once the innate gods discover the traces of these external powerhouses, it is easy to send the cosmic gods to slaughter these galaxy levels, these galaxy levels and galaxy levels do not have the strength of Ye Tian, so naturally there is no way to live.

However, there were many, many galaxy-level and galaxy-level people who came in this time, and there were always a small number of people who obtained Zichenmu.

In the blink of an eye, months passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found a suitable target!
